# machine generated by fibs, don't edit or commit to version control!
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(chips-test C CXX)
set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY USE_FOLDERS ON)
set(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES Debug Release)
set(CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX .html)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY /Users/destroyer/PROJECTS/CPCReady/devcpc-vscode-ext/chips-test/.fibs/dist/emsc-ninja-release)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_DEBUG ${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_RELEASE ${CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
add_compile_options("$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>" "-Wall" "-Wextra" "-Wno-missing-field-initializers" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-O3>" "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-exceptions>" "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-rtti>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>")
add_link_options("-sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432" "-sSTACK_SIZE=524288" "-sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1" "-sMALLOC='emmalloc'" "-sNO_FILESYSTEM=1" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:--closure 1>" "--shell-file=/Users/destroyer/PROJECTS/CPCReady/devcpc-vscode-ext/chips-test/.fibs/imports/fibs-platforms/shell.html" "$<$<LINK_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-exceptions>" "$<$<LINK_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-rtti>" "$<$<CONFIG:RELEASE>:-flto>")
find_program(DENO deno REQUIRED)
add_custom_target(ALL_JOBS COMMAND ${DENO} run --allow-all --no-config jsr:@floooh/fibs runjobs emsc-ninja-release WORKING_DIRECTORY /Users/destroyer/PROJECTS/CPCReady/devcpc-vscode-ext/chips-test)

target_link_libraries(cpc-ui ui roms)
target_compile_definitions(cpc-ui PUBLIC "CHIPS_USE_UI=1")
set_target_properties(cpc-ui PROPERTIES FOLDER emus-ui)
